objects.query: SELECT ConversionFactor, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, Name, RoundingMethod, Scale, Sequence, Status, Type, UnitCode, UnitOfMeasureClassId FROM UnitOfMeasure
SELECT Code, BaseUnitOfMeasureId, DefaultUnitOfMeasureId, Description, Name, Status FROM UnitOfMeasureClass
SELECT ConversionRate, DecimalPlaces, IsActive, IsCorporate, IsoCode FROM CurrencyType
SELECT Name, CatalogType, Code, Description FROM ProductCatalog
SELECT Name, CatalogId, Code, Description, ParentCategoryId, SortOrder, Catalog.Code, ParentCategory.Name FROM ProductCategory
SELECT Name, Status, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, SellingModelType FROM ProductSellingModel
SELECT Name, Code FROM AttributeCategory
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, DataType, Description, Name, Status FROM AttributePicklist
SELECT Name, Code, IsDefault, DisplayValue, PicklistId, Sequence, Value, DisplayValue, Picklist.Name FROM AttributePicklistValue

SELECT Code, CurrencyIsoCode, DataType, DefaultHelpText, DefaultValue, Description, DeveloperName, IsActive, IsRequired, Label, Name, PicklistId, SourceSystemIdentifier, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription FROM AttributeDefinition
SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeCategory.Name, AttributeDefinition.Code FROM AttributeCategoryAttribute
SELECT Name, Code, Status FROM ProductClassification

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeNameOverride, CurrencyIsoCode, DefaultValue, Description, DisplayType, HelpText, IsHidden, IsPriceImpacting, IsReadOnly, IsRequired, MaximumCharacterCount, MaximumValue, MinimumCharacterCount, MinimumValue, Name, ProductClassificationId, Sequence, Status, StepValue, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription, ProductClassification.Code, AttributeDefinition.Code, AttributeCategory.Code FROM ProductClassificationAttr

SELECT BasedOnId, ConfigureDuringSale, CurrencyIsoCode, DisplayUrl, IsActive, IsAssetizable, ProductCode, Description, Family, Name, StockKeepingUnit, Type, QuantityUnitOfMeasure, CanRamp, IsSoldOnlyWithOtherProds, SpecificationType, UnitOfMeasureId FROM Product2 ORDER BY StockKeepingUnit ASC
SELECT ProductCategoryId, ProductId, CatalogId, CurrencyIsoCode, ProductCategory.Name, Product.StockKeepingUnit, Catalog.Code FROM ProductCategoryProduct
SELECT IsDefault, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, ProrationPolicyId, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM ProductSellingModelOption
SELECT Name, Code, ParentProductId, Sequence, MinBundleComponents, MaxBundleComponents, Description, CurrencyIsoCode, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductComponentGroup
SELECT AssociatedProductRoleCat, MainProductRoleCat, Name FROM ProductRelationshipType

SELECT ChildProductClassificationId, ChildProductId, ChildProductRole, ChildSellingModelId, DoesBundlePriceIncludeChild, IsComponentRequired, IsDefaultComponent, IsQuantityEditable, MaxQuantity, MinQuantity, ParentProductId, ParentProductRole, ParentSellingModelId, ProductComponentGroupId, ProductRelationshipTypeId, Quantity, QuantityScaleMethod, Sequence, UnitOfMeasureId, ChildProductClassification.Code, ChildProduct.StockKeepingUnit, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit, ProductComponentGroup.Code, ProductRelationshipType.Name FROM ProductRelatedComponent

SELECT IsQuantityEditable, CurrencyIsoCode, IsExcluded, IsDefaultComponent, MaxQuantity, MinQuantity, Name, OverrideContextId$Product2, DoesBundlePriceIncludeChild, ProductRelatedComponentId, Quantity, QuantityScaleMethod, IsComponentRequired, UnitOfMeasureId, ProductRelatedComponent.Name, OverrideContext.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductRelComponentOverride

SELECT AttributeCategoryId, AttributeDefinitionId, AttributeNameOverride, CurrencyIsoCode, DefaultValue, Description, DisplayType, HelpText, IsHidden, IsPriceImpacting, IsReadOnly, IsRequired, MaximumCharacterCount, MaximumValue, MinimumCharacterCount, MinimumValue, Name, OverrideContextId$Product2, OverriddenProductAttributeDefinitionId, ProductClassificationAttributeId, Product2Id, Sequence, Status, StepValue, UnitOfMeasureId, ValueDescription, AttributeCategory.Code, AttributeDefinition.Code, ProductClassificationAttribute.Name, Product2.StockKeepingUnit FROM ProductAttributeDefinition
SELECT Name, IsActive, IsStandard, CostBookId, ValidFrom, ValidTo, Description FROM Pricebook2
SELECT Name, IsDefault, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo FROM CostBook

SELECT AdjustmentType, CurrencyIsoCode, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, LowerBound, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType, TierType, TierValue, UpperBound, PriceAdjustmentSchedule.Name, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM PriceAdjustmentTier
SELECT AdjustmentMethod, CurrencyIsoCode, Description, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, IsActive, Name, Pricebook2Id, ScheduleType, Pricebook2.Name FROM PriceAdjustmentSchedule WHERE ContractId = NULL
SELECT Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjRule

SELECT AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeDefinitionId, BooleanValue, DateValue, DateTimeValue, DoubleValue, IntegerValue, Operator, ProductId, StringValue, AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name, AttributeDefinition.Code, Product.StockKeepingUnit FROM AttributeAdjustmentCondition

SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, AttributeAdjConditionsHash, AttributeBasedAdjRuleId, AttributeCount, CurrencyIsoCode, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType, AttributeBasedAdjRule.Name, PriceAdjustmentSchedule.Name, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM AttributeBasedAdjustment

SELECT AdjustmentType, AdjustmentValue, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, Name, PriceAdjustmentScheduleId, ProductId, ParentProductId, RootBundleId, ProductSellingModelId, ParentProductSellingModelId, PricingTerm, PricingTermUnit, RootProductSellingModelId, ScheduleType, SellingModelType, CurrencyIsoCode, PriceAdjustmentSchedule.Name, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ParentProduct.StockKeepingUnit, RootBundle.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name, ParentProductSellingModel.Name, RootProductSellingModel.Name FROM BundleBasedAdjustment

SELECT Name, IsActive, IsDerived, Pricebook2Id, Product2Id, ProductSellingModelId, UnitPrice, CurrencyIsoCode, Pricebook2.Name, Product2.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM PricebookEntry ORDER BY Pricebook2.Name ASC, CurrencyIsoCode DESC, Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC

SELECT PricebookId, PricebookEntryId, ProductId, ContributingProductId, ProductSellingModelId, DerivedPricingScope, Formula, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, PricingSource, CurrencyIsoCode, Pricebook.Name, PricebookEntry.Name, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ContributingProduct.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.Name FROM PricebookEntryDerivedPrice ORDER BY Pricebook.Name ASC, CurrencyIsoCode DESC, Name ASC, ProductSellingModel.Name ASC

SELECT Cost, CostBookId, EffectiveFrom, EffectiveTo, ProductId, Description, CurrencyIsoCode, CostBook.Name, Product.StockKeepingUnit FROM CostBookEntry ORDER BY CostBook.Name ASC, CurrencyIsoCode DESC, Name ASC
SELECT CurrencyIsoCode, DurationType, ProductId, ProductSellingModelId, SegmentType, TrialDuration, Product.StockKeepingUnit, ProductSellingModel.SellingModelType FROM ProductRampSegment
SELECT Description, DeveloperName, Language, MasterLabel, RuleEngine, SaveType FROM TransactionProcessingType
